steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The question asks for the depth where the highest number of beach-collected tools were found. This directs us to find the maximum value in the beach-collected column of the table.

steps.title: Locate the maximum and identify the matching depth
steps.content: Scanning the beach-collected column, the values are 7, 99, 2, 18, and 1. The maximum is 99, occurring at 3–4 meters below the surface. All other depths show lower numbers, so none of them qualify. That matches choice C — C is correct.
